titleStmt.title: The Consul General at Peiping ( Clubb ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Consul General at Peiping ( Clubb ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1610. Following are 21 members of standing committee of PCCPolitical Consultative Conference. Preparatory Committee. (This committee was set up June 19 and, with 5 subcommittees, has done basic work drafting documents for submission PCC and drawing up list of delegates during past 3 months.)

Mao Tse-tung,Chairman of Central Committee of Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Chu Teh,Commander in Chief of Chinese Communist armies. Li Chi-shen,Leader of Kuomintang Revolutionary Committee (KmtRC). Li Li-San,Vice Chairman of Communist All-China Federation of Labor (ACFL). Shen Chun-ju,Chinese Democratic League (CDL) leader. Shen Yen-ping (Mao Tun),Novelist. Chou En-lai,Member of Central Committee of Chinese Communist Party and of Politburo; vice chairman of Chinese People’s Revolutionary Military Affairs Committee. Lin Tsu-han,Known also as Lin Po-chu, member of Central Committee of Chinese Communist Party. Ma Yin-chu,Author and member of Academia Sinica. Ma Hsu-lun,Former Chinese Vice Minister of Education. U Lan-fu (Yun Tse),Chairman of Communist regime in Inner Mongolia. Chang Po-chun,Leader of Chinese Peasants and Workers Democratic Party. Chang Lan,Titular leader of Democratic League. Chang Hsi-jo,Professor at Tsinghua University. Kuo Mo-jo,Poet and writer. Chen Shu-tung,Founder of Commercial Press, Shanghai. Tan Kah-ki,Overseas delegate. Huang Yen-pei,People’s League leader. Tsai Ting-kai,Member of Kuomintang Revolutionary Committee. Tsai Chang,Woman revolutionary. Tan Ping-shan.Revolutionary. Mao [Tse-tung, chairman], Chou En-lai, Li Chi-shen, Shen Chun-ju, Kuo Mo-jo, and Chen Shu-tung, vice chairmen.
